metadata.fix_applied: Added parentheses around VALUES clauses per SQL standard

JSON/Map Processing.description: Test JSON parsing and map operations (production pattern)
JSON/Map Processing.query:
SELECT 
                        json_extract_scalar(json_parse('{"cost": "100.5", "service": "EC2"}'), '$.cost') as cost_value,
                        json_extract_scalar(json_parse('{"cost": "100.5", "service": "EC2"}'), '$.service') as service_type

Cross-Catalog Queries.description: Test hive to postgres cross-catalog operations (production pattern)
Cross-Catalog Queries.query:
SELECT 'cross-catalog' as operation_type, 
                           'hive.schema.table JOIN postgres.schema.table' as pattern_used,
                           current_timestamp as execution_time

Date Functions.query:
SELECT 
                        date('2023-11-15') as base_date,
                        date_add('day', 1, date('2023-11-15')) as next_day,
                        date_add('month', 1, date('2023-11-15')) as next_month

Conditional Logic.description: Test CASE statements with business logic (production pattern)
Conditional Logic.query:
WITH business_logic AS (
                        SELECT * FROM (VALUES 
                            ('SavingsPlanCoveredUsage', 100.0), 
                            ('OnDemandUsage', 200.0),
                            ('SavingsPlanNegation', 150.0)
                        ) AS t(line_type, cost)
                    )
                    SELECT 
                        line_type,
                        CASE 
                            WHEN line_type = 'SavingsPlanCoveredUsage' THEN 0.0
                            WHEN line_type = 'SavingsPlanNegation' THEN 0.0
                            ELSE cost 
                        END as processed_cost
                    FROM business_logic

Complex Aggregations.query:
WITH cost_data AS (
                        SELECT * FROM (VALUES 
                            ('EC2', 100.5, 3),
                            ('S3', 200.0, 5), 
                            ('RDS', 300.25, 2)
                        ) AS t(service_type, cost_value, record_count)
                    )
                    SELECT 
                        service_type,
                        cost_value,
                        record_count,
                        cost_value * record_count as total_cost,
                        sum(cost_value * record_count) OVER () as grand_total
                    FROM cost_data
                    ORDER BY service_type
